page: Microsoft Azure M12s_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MSMediumMemoryv3 server family. Powered by an Intel processor with x86_64 architecture, this instance features 12 dedicated vCPUs and 240.0 GB of system memory. This configuration yields a high memory-to-core ratio of 20.0 GB per vCPU, designed specifically for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity relative to compute resources.

The M12s_v3 instance runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external network volumes, though the instance is designated as Premium Storage capable. There are zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this server.

Given its high memory density of 20.0 GB per vCPU, the M12s_v3 offers a specialized hardware profile where the resource allocation is concentrated on memory capacity rather than high core counts or local storage. This makes it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for memory-bound applications that do not require local NVMe drives. Suitable workloads include large in-memory databases, enterprise relational databases, caching layers, and memory-intensive data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure M12s_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MSMediumMemoryv3 family, designed for memory-intensive workloads. It features 12 dedicated vCPUs on an Intel x86_64 architecture and provides 240.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a high ratio of 20.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. The instance operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and does not include local storage, though it is Premium Storage capable for external block storage needs. With no integrated GPU or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, its hardware profile is strictly tailored to memory-heavy operations. This configuration is suitable for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications requiring substantial memory capacity without a corresponding demand for massive CPU core counts or local NVMe storage.
